things.name: Boudhanath Stupa
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage one of the world's largest Buddhist stupas with the all-seeing eyes of Buddha

things.name: Pashupatinath Temple
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage holiest Hindu temple in Nepal with open-air cremations on the Bagmati River

things.name: Swayambhunath Stupa (Monkey Temple)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage hilltop stupa with 365 steps, resident monkeys and all-seeing eyes

things.name: Durbar Squares
things.description: Three UNESCO World Heritage royal squares of Kathmandu, Bhaktapur and Patan

things.name: Everest Mountain Flight
things.description: One-hour sunrise flight over the Himalayas with views of Mount Everest at close range

things.name: Thamel Neighbourhood
things.description: Travellers' quarter with trekking gear, momos, rooftop restaurants and bookshops

things.name: Garden of Dreams
things.description: Restored Edwardian garden oasis in the heart of Kathmandu - the perfect retreat

things.name: Patan (Lalitpur)
things.description: Ancient Newar city with the finest metalwork artisans and a magnificent Durbar Square

things.name: Nagarkot Sunrise
things.description: Hill station 32km from Kathmandu with Himalayan sunrise views including Everest on clear days

things.name: Himalayan White Water Rafting
things.description: Rafting the Bhote Koshi or Trishuli rivers with dramatic mountain scenery
